mapper.select: SELECT id, tenant_id, definition_key, business_key, payload_json::text AS payload_json, current_step, total_steps, status, error, version, started_at, completed_at FROM workflow_instance WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO workflow_instance (id, tenant_id, definition_key, business_key, payload_json, current_step, total_steps, status, error, version, started_at, completed_at) VALUES (#{row.id}, #{row.tenantId}, #{row.definitionKey}, #{row.businessKey}, #{row.payloadJson}::jsonb, #{row.currentStep}, #{row.totalSteps}, #{row.status}, #{row.error}, #{row.version}, #{row.startedAt}, #{row.completedAt})
mapper.update: UPDATE workflow_instance SET current_step = #{row.currentStep}, status = #{row.status}, error = #{row.error}, version = #{row.version}, completed_at = #{row.completedAt}, updated_at = now() WHERE id = #{row.id} AND version = #{expectedVersion}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM workflow_instance WHERE id = #{id} AND version = #{expectedVersion}
mapper.select: SELECT instance_id, step_no, name, status, started_at, completed_at, error FROM workflow_step WHERE instance_id = #{instanceId} ORDER BY step_no
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO workflow_step (instance_id, step_no, name, status, started_at, completed_at, error) VALUES (#{row.instanceId}, #{row.stepNo}, #{row.name}, #{row.status}, #{row.startedAt}, #{row.completedAt}, #{row.error})

INSERT INTO workflow_step (instance_id, step_no, name, status, started_at, completed_at, error) VALUES (#{row.instanceId}, #{row.stepNo}, #{row.name}, #{row.status}, #{row.startedAt}, #{row.completedAt}, #{row.error}) ON CONFLICT (instance_id, step_no) DO UPDATE SET status = EXCLUDED.status, started_at = EXCLUDED.started_at, completed_at = EXCLUDED.completed_at, error = EXCLUDED.error
